# PocketMage

> Generated by docmd

## Documentation Files

- [PocketMage Command Manual](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/command-manual/)
  Keystrokes and command reference for the PocketMage PDA.
- [Build Environments & PlatformIO Setup](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/development/build-environments/)
  How to set up PlatformIO and build PocketMage firmware on Linux, Mac, and Windows.
- [Development](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/development/)
  Guides for building, extending, and contributing to PocketMage.
- [PocketMage FAQ](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/faq/)
  Frequently asked questions about the PocketMage PDA device.
- [PocketMage Documentation](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/)
  Official documentation for the PocketMage open-source PDA device.
- [PocketMage Script Example: Basic Input/Output](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/scripting/example-c/)
  A simple PocketMage script demonstrating user input, OLED output, and terminal printing.
- [PocketMage Scripting Reference](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/scripting/fullPotionCommandList/)
  Complete API reference for Wrench script bindings on PocketMage.
- [Scripting](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/scripting/)
  Scripting reference and examples for the PocketMage TERMINAL app (Wrench).
- [PocketMage Script Example: E-Ink Drawing](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/scripting/ink-c/)
  A PocketMage script demonstrating drawing shapes and text on the E-Ink display.
- [PocketMage Script Example: OLED Drawing](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/scripting/oled-c/)
  A PocketMage script demonstrating drawing shapes and text on the OLED display.
- [Format a MicroSD Card for PocketMage](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/tutorials/format-micro-sd/)
  Guide to formatting SD cards for compatibility with PocketMage.
- [PocketMage Tutorials](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/tutorials/)
  Step-by-step guides for PocketMage setup and configuration.
- [Setting Up a PocketMage Build Environment](https://ashtf8.github.io/PocketMage_PDA/docs/tutorials/platformio-config/)
  How to set up PlatformIO and build PocketMage firmware on Linux, Mac, and Windows.
